cadence_note: ONS publishes to the open-data portal (dados.ons.org.br) on a rolling basis; most operational datasets (carga, geracao, CMO, hydrology) are revised continuously and the current-year/current-period file is rewritten as data consolidates. No single published release calendar; a weekly full re-pull captures revisions and new daily/monthly partitions. Inferred from observed metadata_modified timestamps (recent datasets last modified within days).
